product_overview: EcoSort is an eco-waste management platform that lets visitors learn about the mission, view public impact data, and participate in community recycling content. It also supports account creation, login, waste scanning, rewards redemption, and user dashboards for tracking progress.
core_goals: Allow users to explore the EcoSort homepage and navigate between site sections.
Display the organization’s goals, mission, global impact, and leaderboard pages.
Provide a community section for users to browse and post content.
Facilitate user authentication and user profile data management.
Allow users to submit contact forms.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can create an account or log in to access personalized features and profile data.
user_flows: Navigate to the homepage -> Choose to sign up -> Fill in full name -> Fill in email address -> Fill in password -> Submit account creation form -> See successful account creation and automatic login
Navigate to the homepage -> Choose to log in -> Fill in email address -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See authenticated access and personalized account state
Navigate to the homepage -> Choose to log in -> Fill in incorrect email or password -> Submit login form -> See an invalid credentials message

features.name: AI Waste Scanner
features.description: Users can upload or capture waste images, get a classification result, and complete a two-step verification process to earn credits.
user_flows: Navigate to the scan experience from the homepage -> Upload an image or open the camera -> Capture or select a waste photo -> Preview the image -> Analyze the image -> View material type, recyclability, and credits earned

Navigate to the scan experience from the homepage -> Upload an image or open the camera -> Capture or select a waste photo -> Preview the image -> Analyze the image -> Continue to step 2 -> Upload a smart bin image -> Analyze the smart bin image -> View verification match status and final credits awarded

features.name: Rewards Marketplace
features.description: Authenticated users can browse rewards, claim items, and view redeem codes and claim history.
user_flows: Navigate to the marketplace from the homepage -> View current credits balance -> Browse achievement badges -> Browse redeemable rewards -> Claim a reward -> See the claimed reward modal with redeem code -> Copy the redeem code -> View the claimed rewards history

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated users can view personal recycling summaries, charts, and scan history.
user_flows: Navigate to the dashboard from the homepage -> View total credits, items scanned, and badge count -> View the material distribution chart -> View the recycling activity chart -> Review the scan history table

features.name: Community Chat and Story Wall
features.description: Users can read community posts and create new chat or story updates with optional photos.
user_flows: Navigate to the community page -> View the latest community posts feed -> Fill in a name -> Choose a post type -> Write a message -> Optionally add a photo URL -> Submit the post -> See the new post appear in the feed

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Users can send a message through the gallery and contact page.
user_flows: Navigate to the gallery and contact page -> Fill in a name -> Fill in an email address -> Write a message -> Submit the form -> See a success confirmation
Navigate to the gallery and contact page -> Fill in a name -> Fill in an email address -> Enter a message that is too short -> Submit the form -> See a validation error

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: Users can view ranked contributors based on scans, credits, and badges.
user_flows: Navigate to the leaderboard page -> View the ranked list of users with names, scan counts, credits, and badges

features.name: Environmental Impact Statistics
features.description: Users can view global recycling impact statistics on the homepage and impact page.
user_flows: Navigate to the impact page or scroll to the impact section on the homepage -> View total eco-credits, items sorted, CO2 saved, and rewards claimed

features.name: Featured Media Showcase
features.description: Users can browse featured recycling images and videos with descriptions on the homepage.
user_flows: Navigate to the homepage -> Scroll to the media showcase section -> View featured images and videos with descriptions

features.name: Recycling Knowledge Quiz
features.description: Users can answer a short recycling quiz and see their score immediately.
user_flows: Navigate to the quiz section on the homepage -> Select answers for each question -> See instant feedback for each answer -> View the final quiz score

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
features.description: Users can switch the site theme between light and dark mode.
user_flows: Navigate to the homepage -> Toggle dark mode -> See the site theme switch between light and dark modes

features.name: Goals and Mission
features.description: Users can read the organization’s goals and mission information.
user_flows: Navigate to the goals and mission page -> Read the goals and mission content

routes.description: Main SPA landing page with home, detect, rewards, and dashboard views
Full community chat and story wall page

features.name: User Authentication (Sign Up)
features.description: Users can create an account with name, email and password
user_interactions: Click Sign Up button in navigation bar
Fill in Full Name field
Fill in Email Address field
Fill in Password field (min 6 characters)
Click Create Account button
See success and get logged in automatically

features.name: User Authentication (Login)
features.description: Users can log in with email and password to access their account
user_interactions: Click Log In button in navigation bar
Fill in Email Address field
Fill in Password field
Click Log In button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: AI Waste Scanner (Step 1)
features.description: Upload or capture an image of waste item for AI classification using TensorFlow MobileNet
user_interactions: Navigate to Scan & Earn section via navbar or bottom nav
Click upload area to select an image file OR click Open Camera button
If camera is opened, capture a photo using the camera modal
Preview the uploaded/captured image
Click Analyze & Earn Credits button
View classification results showing material type, recyclability and credits

features.name: AI Waste Scanner (Step 2 - Smart Bin Verification)
features.description: Upload a second image of a smart bin to verify the waste was properly disposed, completing the two-step verification
user_interactions: After Step 1 analysis, click Continue to Step 2 button
Upload a smart bin image
Click Analyze Smart Bin Image button
View verification results showing match status and credits awarded

features.name: Rewards Marketplace
features.description: View and redeem eco-credits for badges and rewards with unique redeem codes
user_interactions: Navigate to Marketplace via navbar
View available credits balance
Browse achievement badges section
Browse redeemable rewards with costs
Click Claim button on a reward
See reward claimed modal with redeem code
Copy redeem code
View claimed rewards history table

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: User dashboard with scan history, statistics charts, and recycling analytics
user_interactions: Navigate to Dashboard/Profile via navbar or bottom nav
View total credits, items scanned, and badges count
View pie chart of material distribution
View line chart of recycling activity over time
Browse scan history table with item details

features.name: Community Chat and Story Wall
features.description: Post and view community messages, stories, and photos about recycling
user_interactions: View latest community posts feed
Fill in Name field in Share Update form
Select post Type (Chat or Story)
Write a Message
Optionally add a Photo URL
Click Post to Community button
See new post appear in feed

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Users can send a message via the contact form on the gallery-contact page
user_interactions: Navigate to gallery-contact.html page
Fill in Name field
Fill in Email field
Fill in Message field (min 10 characters)
Click Send/Submit button
See success confirmation

features.name: Leaderboard
features.description: View ranked list of top recycling users by credits and scan count
user_interactions: Navigate to leaderboard.html page
View ranked list of users with name, scans, credits, and badge

features.name: Environmental Impact Statistics
features.description: View global recycling statistics fetched from the backend
user_interactions: Scroll down on home page to Our Collective Impact section
View total eco-credits, items sorted, CO2 saved, rewards claimed

features.name: Featured Media Showcase
features.description: Backend-driven media gallery showing recycling images and videos
user_interactions: Scroll to media showcase section on home page
View featured images and videos with descriptions

features.name: Recycling Knowledge Quiz
features.description: Interactive 4-question quiz about recycling facts
user_interactions: Scroll to quiz section on home page
Click answer options for each question
See instant feedback for correct/incorrect answers
View final quiz score

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
features.description: Toggle between light and dark themes site-wide
user_interactions: Click Dark mode toggle button in navigation bar
See site theme switch between light and dark mode

known_limitations.issue: Rewards and badges are stored client-side, redemption only updates user data via PUT /api/data/me
known_limitations.impact: Reward catalog is hardcoded in frontend JS, not managed server-side

known_limitations.issue: TensorFlow MobileNet classification maps generic ImageNet labels to waste categories via a heuristic mapping
known_limitations.impact: Classification accuracy depends on keyword mapping, not a purpose-trained waste model

known_limitations.issue: Duplicate image detection uses perceptual hashing stored per-user, not a global dedup system
known_limitations.impact: Different users can scan the same image and both earn credits
